subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket with the hood up and dark trousers, stepping off the roadside to cross the foggy hamlet street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears rubber boots damp with dew; the red jacket the one vivid shape in the mist, hood raised
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket with hood up, dark trousers, rubber boots, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Fair, smooth youthful skin cool in the misty light
subjects.facial_features: Round face partly veiled by mist and the raised hood, small features

subjects.description: A few parked pickups and older cars along the gravel-edged curbs of the hamlet street, half-dissolved in fog
subjects.appearance_details: Weathered pickups and older sedans in dark, muted colors, their outlines softened and dulled by the drifting mist
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A small forested-hamlet residential street in rural North America in dim pre-dawn fog. A handful of timber and clapboard cottages sit among tall pines and bare autumn trees along a narrow two-lane road of damp asphalt. Low mist hangs between the trunks, softening a few parked pickups and older cars along the gravel-edged curbs. A porch light or two glows faintly. The damp road shows faded center markings; the diffuse foggy half-light casts no real shadows.

lighting.conditions: Dim pre-dawn twilight thick with fog and mist
lighting.direction: Weak, diffuse pre-dawn glow scattered evenly by the fog
lighting.shadows: No distinct shadows; fog flattens the dim light
lighting.illumination_effect: Low, cool, misty illumination with drifting fog reducing visibility; the child's red jacket reads as the one strong color emerging from the grey murk

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool grey-blue fog, dark pine silhouettes, damp charcoal asphalt, faint warm porch light, and a muted red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Still, hushed foggy pre-dawn calm broken by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Receding tree trunks fading into fog, a few parked pickups, drifting mist

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near road and crossing child; the misty background dissolves into soft grey

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the foggy rural hamlet street before dawn.
A small child in a red jacket emerges from the mist, steps off the right roadside and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the damp road, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the damp asphalt, partially faded and softened by the low fog, still readable up close
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the foggy pre-dawn hamlet street, dim pines and parked pickups half-hidden in mist.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed through fog
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child emerges from the mist and steps into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears from the fog; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely through the mist.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary in the fog

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a foggy rural hamlet street before dawn, dim pines and a few parked pickups emerging from the mist. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead out of the murk. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, slowing with a slight forward pitch on the damp road. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the fog while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Muffled pre-dawn forest quiet with faint dripping from wet branches and a distant bird, the low hum of the vehicle over damp asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a soft idle deadened by the fog.
